methodsAttempted.query: site:utm.my Universiti Teknologi Malaysia generative AI artificial intelligence policy ChatGPT academic integrity students
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search surfaced the UTM CDex guideline PDF and several non-policy official UTM pages, including a journal article and library/news items.

methodsAttempted.query: site:utm.my "Guidelines for the Use of Generative Artificial Intelligence" UTM
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search surfaced the UTM CDex policy index page and the PDF version of the guideline.
The UTM CDex policy index page listed the English and Malay guideline PDFs directly, and direct official fetches confirmed the guideline text.

artifacts.summary: Official UTM CDex discovery identified the GenAI teaching-and-learning guideline index and the Malay guideline PDF as the usable policy sources. A UTM journal article, a library current-awareness page, and a faculty report portal were rejected because they were not policy text and did not support university-wide claims.

stopConditions: Stop after official UTM CDex pages provide direct support for claim candidates.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Garis Panduan Penggunaan Kecerdasan Buatan Generatif dalam Pengajaran dan Pembelajaran Universiti Teknologi Malaysia

artifacts.claimText: UTM CDex lists both Malay and English versions of the generative AI teaching-and-learning guideline on its policy/handbook/procedure/guidelines page.
artifacts.normalizedValue: UTM CDex lists the GenAI teaching-and-learning guideline in both Malay and English.

citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.claimText: UTM's guideline applies to all undergraduate and postgraduate academic programmes that intend to use generative AI, and it was approved by the University Senate and effective from 27 March 2024.
artifacts.normalizedValue: Applies to all undergraduate and postgraduate academic programmes; effective 27 March 2024.

citation.citationTitle: Garis Panduan Penggunaan Kecerdasan Buatan Generatif dalam Pengajaran dan Pembelajaran Universiti Teknologi Malaysia
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.claimText: UTM requires academic staff to clearly state GAI use in course assessments, and prioritizes continuous assessments that demonstrate deep mastery.
artifacts.normalizedValue: Academic staff should disclose GAI use in assessments; continuous assessments demonstrating deep mastery are prioritized.

citation.citationTitle: Garis Panduan Penggunaan Kecerdasan Buatan Generatif dalam Pengajaran dan Pembelajaran Universiti Teknologi Malaysia
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.claimText: UTM requires GAI use in assignments and works to be listed with developer information, tool name, version, access date, and URL when available; undisclosed use can be treated as plagiarism.
artifacts.normalizedValue: GAI use must be disclosed and cited in assignments and works; undisclosed use can count as plagiarism.

citation.citationTitle: Garis Panduan Penggunaan Kecerdasan Buatan Generatif dalam Pengajaran dan Pembelajaran Universiti Teknologi Malaysia
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.claimText: UTM says GAI services beyond proofreading tools must be explicitly stated, and GAI tools cannot be listed as co-authors.
artifacts.normalizedValue: GAI use beyond proofreading tools must be disclosed; GAI tools cannot be co-authors.

citation.citationTitle: Garis Panduan Penggunaan Kecerdasan Buatan Generatif dalam Pengajaran dan Pembelajaran Universiti Teknologi Malaysia
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.claimText: UTM says reliable GAI tools should have data privacy management and protection systems and be safe to use.
artifacts.normalizedValue: Reliable GAI tools should have data privacy management and protection systems.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Garis Panduan Penggunaan Kecerdasan Buatan Generatif dalam Pengajaran dan Pembelajaran Universiti Teknologi Malaysia
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal:
Nama Garis Panduan : Garis Panduan Penggunaan Kecerdasan Buatan Generatif dalam Pengajaran dan Pembelajaran UTM
Nombor Garis Panduan : Pekeliling Akademik Bil.3/2024
Diluluskan Oleh : Mesyuarat Senat Universiti Bil.6/2023/2024
Tarikh Kuat kuasa : 27 Mac 2024
I. Garis Panduan ini terpakai kepada semua program akademik sama ada pra siswazah atau pasca siswazah di UTM, meliputi pengajian perdana dan usahasama, sama ada sepenuh masa atau separuh masa yang ingin menggunakan kecerdasan buatan generatif (KBG) dalam program masing-masing.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: The guideline is an Academic Circular 3/2024 approved by the University Senate and applies to undergraduate and postgraduate programmes that intend to use generative AI.
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Garis Panduan Penggunaan Kecerdasan Buatan Generatif dalam Pengajaran dan Pembelajaran Universiti Teknologi Malaysia
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal:
2.2.2.1 Kaedah pentaksiran berterusan bagi mempamerkan penguasaan mendalam perlu diutamakan seperti demonstrasi, pembentangan, perbahasan, temuduga dan pentaksiran lain yang bersesuaian kerana aplikasi KBG boleh menyebabkan hasil tugasan akademik yang disediakan oleh pelajar tidak mempamerkan penguasaan sebenar pelajar.

2.2.3 Staf akademik perlu menyatakan dengan jelas penggunaan KBG dalam pentaksiran kursus kepada pelajar selari dengan garis panduan Universiti.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: UTM prioritizes continuous assessments that show deep mastery and requires academic staff to clearly disclose GAI use in course assessments.

artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal:
2.3.3 Penggunaan KBG perlu disenaraikan dalam tugasan dan hasil karya bagi aktiviti P&P yang mengandungi maklumat pembangun peralatan, nama peralatan, versi peralatan, tarikh akses, serta pautan URL (jika ada) berdasarkan format berikut:

2.3.7 Sebarang penulisan dan hasil karya dalam aktiviti P&P yang tidak menyatakan penggunaan KBG (jika ada) boleh dikategorikan sebagai plagiat sebagaimana Peraturan Akademik Universiti.

artifacts.title: Universiti Teknologi Malaysia GenAI guideline staged report
artifacts.summary: UTM CDex publishes a generative-AI teaching-and-learning guideline that applies across academic programmes and specifies disclosure, citation, authorship, and privacy expectations.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
